items.title_en: Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta
items.title_zh: 《Careless People》作者被禁言，不能对 Meta 提出负评
items.summary_en: An author reportedly faces restrictions on saying anything negative about Meta due to a non-disparagement clause. The case highlights tensions around platform power, publishing rights, and freedom of expression in tech culture.
items.summary_zh: 据称该作者因“不得贬损”条款被限制公开批评 Meta。这起事件凸显了平台权力、出版权利与科技领域言论自由之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: Show HN: A game where you build a GPU
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个组装显卡的游戏
items.summary_en: An interactive game where players design and assemble a GPU, exploring how architectural choices affect performance. It demonstrates how approachable hardware engineering concepts can be gamified to educate and inspire tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 玩家在游戏中设计并组装显卡，探索架构选择如何影响性能。该项目展示了将硬件工程概念以游戏化方式呈现的潜力，能激发学习和动手兴趣。

items.title_en: German men 18-45 need military permit to leave country for longer than 3 months
items.title_zh: 德国 18–45 岁男性出国超过 3 个月需军事许可
items.summary_en: Germany requires a military permit for men aged 18-45 to stay abroad longer than three months, reflecting legal-military travel controls and national service considerations.
items.summary_zh: 德国要求 18–45 岁男性若出国居留超过三个月需军事许可，体现了法定军事旅行管控与国民服役相关考量。

items.title_en: 12,000 AI-generated blog posts added in a single commit
items.title_zh: Show HN：一次提交中加入 12,000 篇 AI 生成的博客
items.summary_en: A single commit adds 12k AI-generated blog posts, illustrating the scale of automated content generation and the accompanying concerns around quality, authenticity, and moderation.
items.summary_zh: 一次提交中新增 12,000 篇 AI 生成的博客，展示了自动化内容生成的规模及其在质量、真实性和内容审核方面的潜在担忧。

items.title_en: Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs
items.title_zh: Apple 批准驱动让 Nvidia eGPU 在 Arm Mac 上工作
items.summary_en: Apple approved a driver enabling Nvidia external GPUs to accelerate Arm-based Macs, expanding hardware options for power users. This marks a notable shift in the Mac ecosystem's flexibility.
items.summary_zh: 苹果批准一款驱动，使 Nvidia 外接显卡在 Arm 架构的 Mac 上工作，扩展了高性能用户的硬件选项。这标志着 Mac 生态在硬件灵活性方面的一次重要转变。

items.title_en: Simple self-distillation improves code generation
items.title_zh: 苹果：极其简单的自蒸馏提升代码生成
items.summary_en: A simple self-distillation technique improves code generation quality in experiments, suggesting a cheap method to boost model performance without large compute overhead. It could be applied to training or inference of code assistants.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示一种极其简单的自蒸馏方法就能提升代码生成质量，成本低且易于在现有模型上实现。该方法对提升代码生成能力有潜在意义，可能为改进代码助手和编程相关任务提供可行路径。

items.title_en: Scientists capture how cells trigger inflammation
items.title_zh: Scientists capture how cells trigger inflammation
items.summary_en: Researchers map intracellular triggers that initiate inflammation, shedding light on how immune responses are activated from within the cell. The findings could inform targeted therapies for infections and autoimmune diseases.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员绘制了细胞内部引发炎症的触发机制，阐明了免疫反应如何从细胞内部被激活。相关发现或为感染与自身免疫疾病的靶向治疗提供线索。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 告知 HN：Anthropic 不再允许 Claude Code 订阅使用 OpenClaw
items.summary_en: Anthropic has restricted Claude Code subscriptions from using OpenClaw, cutting off a popular integration point for code tooling. The move highlights how policy controls can disrupt developer workflows and force users to renegotiate tools or licenses.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 已限制 Claude Code 订阅无法使用 OpenClaw，取消了与该工具的集成入口。此举凸显平台策略对开发者工作流的影响，用户可能需要重新选择工具或调整授权方式。

items.title_en: Iran's Network of Cameras Bolsters Air Defenses, Expert Says
items.title_zh: 伊朗摄像头网络增强防空能力，专家称
items.summary_en: Reports that Iran’s camera network enhances air defense readiness, illustrating how modern sensors integrate with defense systems. The piece touches on regional security dynamics and surveillance tech.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出伊朗的摄像头网络提升了防空 ready 状态，展示了现代传感器与防御系统的整合。涉及地区安全格局与监控技术。

items.title_en: What life looks like on the most remote inhabited island
items.title_zh: 最偏远有人居岛屿的生活长啥样
items.summary_en: An immersive look at life on Tristan da Cunha, a remote island with unique logistics and limited connectivity. It offers insights into resilience, community, and the challenges of staying online in isolation.
items.summary_zh: 深入观察偏远岛屿 Tristan da Cunha 的生活，揭示独特的物流、有限网络以及在孤立环境中保持联系的挑战与社区韧性。

items.title_en: Artemis II crew take “spectacular” image of Earth
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务组拍出壮观的地球照片
items.summary_en: The Artemis II crew captured a spectacular image of Earth from near-space, showcasing our planet in a breathtaking vantage point during the mission phase. The shot underscores NASA's focus on crewed lunar exploration and the growing role of high-quality space photography in public engagement. It also highlights the technical readiness required for long-duration deep-space missions.
items.summary_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务组在近空间阶段拍摄出地球的壮观影像，从独特视角展现了这颗行星的美丽与脆弱。这张照片体现了 NASA 对载人月球探索的持续推进，以及高质量太空影像在公众参与中的作用，同时也凸显了支撑长期深空任务的技术准备。

items.title_en: Why the Most Valuable Things You Know Are Things You Cannot Say
items.title_zh: 你最有价值的东西往往是不能说出的东西
items.summary_en: A provocative take on tacit or sensitive knowledge being more valuable than explicit information, with implications for AI safety, whistleblowing, and how we share information responsibly.
items.summary_zh: 对隐性或敏感知识比显性信息更具价值的观点发人深省，涉及 AI 安全、吹哨机制与负责任信息共享等议题。

items.title_en: Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：TurboQuant-WASM—浏览器中的向量量化
items.summary_en: TurboQuant-WASM brings Google's vector quantization into WebAssembly, enabling fast, client-side model compression and indexing without server queries. This lowers latency for on-device AI workflows and demos.
items.summary_zh: TurboQuant-WASM 将 Google's 向量量化带到 WebAssembly，实现客户端的快速模型压缩和离线索引，无需服务器请求。让本地 AI 工作流和演示的延迟更低。

items.title_en: US deploying nearly all stealthy long-range JASSM-ER cruise missiles to Iran war
items.title_zh: 美国正在向伊朗战争部署几乎所有隐形长程 JASSM-ER 巡航导弹
items.summary_en: The U.S. is deploying a large share of its stealthy, long-range JASSM-ER missiles to the Iran theater, signaling a modernization of precision strike capabilities. The move has strategic implications for regional deterrence and risk of escalation.
items.summary_zh: 美国将大部分隐形长程 JASSM-ER 导弹部署到伊朗战区，标志着精确打击能力的现代化升级。这一举动对区域威慑力与升级风险具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Some Unusual Trees
items.title_zh: 一些不寻常的树木
items.summary_en: A survey of unusual trees from diverse habitats, highlighting odd growth forms, adaptation strategies, and ecological roles. The piece connects botanical quirks to larger questions about biodiversity and conservation.
items.summary_zh: 本文整理了各种不寻常的树木，聚焦独特的生长形态、适应策略以及在生态系统中的作用。通过这些树木的特征，揭示生物多样性与保护的重要性。

items.title_en: Delve removed from Y Combinator
items.title_zh: Delve 已从 YC 移除
items.summary_en: Delve has been removed from Y Combinator's portfolio, signaling changes in YC's backing or evaluation criteria. For startups and investors, it highlights the fluid nature of accelerator affiliations and the importance of diversification.
items.summary_zh: Delve 已不再属于 Y Combinator 的投资组合，表明 YC 的扶持标准或组合策略发生变化。这对初创公司和投资人意味着加速器关系并非一成不变，分散风险更为重要。

items.title_en: When legal sports betting surges, so do Americans' financial problems
items.title_zh: 合法体育博彩激增也伴随美国产生的财务问题
items.summary_en: Research links surges in legal sports betting to rising financial difficulties among Americans, including bankruptcy risk and debt. It raises questions about consumer protections and responsible gambling policies.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示合法体育博彩激增与美国人财务困难加剧相关，包括破产风险和债务问题，促使我们思考消费者保护与理性博彩政策。

items.title_en: Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens
items.title_zh: Show HN：sllm—与其他开发者分割一个 GPU 节点，无限令牌
items.summary_en: A platform that partitions a single GPU node among multiple developers, enabling shared AI workloads with generous token allowances. It lowers the barrier to experimenting with large models without owning multiple GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 一个平台将单个 GPU 节点分配给多名开发者，支持共享的 AI 工作负载和慷慨的令牌配额。降低了在没有多块 GPU 的情况下进行大模型试验的门槛。

items.title_en: The FAA’s flight restriction for drones is an attempt to criminalize filming ICE
items.title_zh: FAA 的无人机飞行限制试图将拍摄 ICE 刑事化
items.summary_en: The FAA's temporary drone flight restriction near certain facilities has drawn criticism for appearing to criminalize filming ICE activities and limiting First Amendment coverage of law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 针对特定区域的无人机飞行限制引发担忧，批评者认为这等举措将拍摄 ICE 的行为刑事化并削弱对执法活动的监督报道。

items.title_en: Components of a Coding Agent
items.title_zh: 编码代理的组成要素
items.summary_en: An exposition on the essential components of a coding agent, including planning, tool usage, memory, and evaluation. The piece argues for modular design and robust interfaces to make AI copilots effective in real coding tasks.
items.summary_zh: 阐述了编码代理的基本组成要素，包括计划、工具使用、记忆和评估。强调模块化设计和稳健接口对提升 AI 助手在真实编程任务中的效果的重要性。

items.title_en: Google releases Gemma 4 open models
items.title_zh: 谷歌发布 Gemma 4 开源模型
items.summary_en: Google releases Gemma 4 open models, expanding the Gemma family with a newer generation that can be run by researchers and developers on their own hardware. This move underscores Google's push toward open, auditable AI and could accelerate experimentation outside managed cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌发布 Gemma 4 开源模型，提供新一代可供研究者和开发者在本地硬件上运行的能力。这一举动凸显谷歌向开放、可审计的 AI 生态迈进，可能加速在自有环境中的研究与实验。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a frontpage for personal blogs
items.title_zh: Show HN：我为个人博客搭建了一个前端首页
items.summary_en: A compact, customizable front page that aggregates posts from individual blogs into a single, readable landing. It demonstrates how a focused, self-hosted homepage can replace generic blogrolls and improve reader discovery.
items.summary_zh: 作者为个人博客制作了一个前端首页，能把多篇博客的内容聚合在一个整洁、快速的登陆页上。此举展示了轻量、可自托管的个人站点在读者发现体验上的潜在优势。

items.title_en: F-15E jet shot down over Iran
items.title_zh: F-15E 战斗机在伊朗上空被击落
items.summary_en: An F-15E was shot down over Iran, marking a significant escalation in regional tensions. The incident underscores the fragility of aviation assets in volatile zones and the risk of broader security spillovers. It will likely influence defense Posture and policy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 一架 F-15E 战斗机在伊朗上空被击落，标志着区域紧张局势的升级。此事件凸显在高风险地区维护航空资产的脆弱性与潜在的安全扩散风险，可能影响防务态势与政策取向。

items.title_en: Astronomers Find a Third Galaxy Missing Its Dark Matter
items.title_zh: 天文学家发现第三个缺乏暗物质的星系
items.summary_en: Astronomers identify a galaxy missing dark matter, lending support to violent-collision scenarios and challenging standard galaxy formation models. It provides a data point for understanding dark matter distribution.
items.summary_zh: 天文学家发现第三个缺乏暗物质的星系，为暴力碰撞理论提供支持，并挑战了常规星系形成模型，提供了理解暗物质分布的一个数据点。

items.title_en: iNaturalist
items.title_zh: iNaturalist 自然观测平台
items.summary_en: iNaturalist enables crowdsourced biodiversity data from millions of users, driving research and conservation. Its open data catalog helps scientists track species distributions and ecological changes over time. The community-driven platform also highlights the value and challenges of citizen science data.
items.summary_zh: iNaturalist 通过海量用户的群体观测，推动生物多样性研究与保护。开放数据目录帮助科学家跟踪物种分布与生态变化，提升研究与教育的可及性。社区驱动的模式同时也暴露了公民科学数据的质量与治理挑战。

items.title_en: Gold overtakes U.S. Treasuries as the largest foreign reserve asset
items.title_zh: 黄金超过美国国债成为全球最大的外储资产
items.summary_en: Gold has overtaken US Treasuries as the world's largest foreign reserve asset, reflecting central banks' diversification away from dollar assets amid geopolitical risk and inflation. The shift could influence bond markets and gold demand dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 黄金已取代美国国债成为全球最大的外储资产，反映各央行在地缘政治风险与通胀背景下对美元资产的多元化配置。这一变化可能影响债券市场与黄金需求的格局。

items.title_en: Deafness reversed: One injection restores hearing in just weeks – ScienceDaily
items.title_zh: 听力逆转：一次注射在数周内恢复听力
items.summary_en: A breakthrough showing hearing restoration after a single injection, with weeks to measurable results. Signals progress in gene or regenerative therapies for sensory loss.
items.summary_zh: 显示单次注射即可实现听力恢复，数周内取得可测量的结果，标志着基因治疗或再生医学在感官丧失治疗方面的进步。

items.title_en: OpenClaw privilege escalation vulnerability
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 提权漏洞（CVE-2026-33579）
items.summary_en: A privilege escalation vulnerability in OpenClaw could allow local attackers to obtain higher privileges. Users should patch and update affected installations to mitigate risk.
items.summary_zh: OpenClaw 存在本地提权漏洞，潜在攻击者可提升权限。受影响环境需尽快打补丁以降低风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac
items.title_zh: Show HN: Apfel — 你的 Mac 上已经有的免费 AI
items.summary_en: Apfel is a free AI that runs directly on macOS, letting users access AI capabilities without a cloud subscription. By processing locally, it aims to improve privacy and reduce reliance on external services.
items.summary_zh: Apfel 是一款在 macOS 上本地运行的免费 AI，用户无需云端订阅即可获得人工智能能力。通过本地处理，它强调提高隐私并降低对外部服务的依赖。

items.title_en: Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years
items.title_zh: Claude Code 发现隐藏了23年的 Linux 漏洞
items.summary_en: A Linux vulnerability hidden in code paths for 23 years was uncovered by Claude Code. The write-up details the flaw, its potential impact, and how the fix changes kernel hardening and developer practices.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 发现了一处在 Linux 代码路径中长期隐藏的漏洞，存在了23年并现已披露。文章描述了漏洞类型、潜在影响以及修补要点，并讨论对内核强健性和开发实践的影响。

items.title_en: The CMS is dead. Long live the CMS
items.title_zh: CMS 已死，CMS 万岁
items.summary_en: Argues that the traditional CMS is being replaced by modular, headless, and composable content platforms.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为传统的内容管理系统正在被模块化、无头和可组合的内容平台取代。随着“CMS”概念的进化，这对开发者与内容团队意味着新的工作方式与挑战。

items.title_en: Decisions that eroded trust in Azure – by a former Azure Core engineer
items.title_zh: 让 Azure 信任度受损的决策—一位前 Azure Core 工程师的看法
items.summary_en: A former Azure Core engineer details decisions that undermined customer trust, touching on feature deprecation, opaque updates, and governance friction that frustrated developers and admins. The piece reframes Azure’s evolution as a case study in cloud trust and product governance.
items.summary_zh: 一位前 Azure Core 工程师揭示削弱用户信任的决策，涉及功能弃用、更新不透明与治理摩擦等问题，令开发者和管理员感到挫败。该分析将 Azure 的演变视为云信任与产品治理的案例研究。

items.title_en: There Is a RAM Shortage
items.title_zh: RAM 仍然紧缺
items.summary_en: A memo on the ongoing RAM memory shortage and its impact on data centers, cloud services, and AI workloads. Highlights pricing dynamics and supply chain constraints shaping hardware decisions.
items.summary_zh: 关于 RAM 仍然短缺的讨论，及其对数据中心、云服务与 AI 工作负载的影响，强调价格波动和供应链限制在硬件决策中的作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Running local OpenClaw together with remote agents in an open network
items.title_zh: Show HN：本地 OpenClaw 与远程代理在开放网络中协同运行
items.summary_en: Demonstrates running a local OpenClaw setup alongside remote agents in an open network, enabling distributed agent collaboration. This accelerates experimentation with autonomous systems while inviting questions about governance and security.
items.summary_zh: 展示了在开放网络中，本地 OpenClaw 与远程代理协同运行，支持分布式代理协作。这有助于加速自主系统的实验，同时也引发治理与安全方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Run Linux containers on Android, no root required
items.title_zh: 在 Android 上无需 root 即可运行 Linux 容器
items.summary_en: A project shows Linux containers can run on Android without root access, enabling isolated Linux environments on mobile devices. While promising for portability and dev/test workflows, it raises questions about performance and security.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目展示了在 Android 上无需 root 就能运行 Linux 容器，允许在手机上创建独立的 Linux 环境。虽然对可移植性和开发测试很有吸引力，但也带来性能和安全性的考量。

items.title_en: Iran strikes leave Amazon availability zones "hard down" in Bahrain and Dubai
items.title_zh: 伊朗袭击致巴林和迪拜的亚马逊可用区出现严重中断
items.summary_en: Geopolitical strikes knocked AWS availability zones in Bahrain and Dubai offline, disrupting regional cloud services. The outage underscores the fragility of regional cloud infrastructure and the importance of disaster recovery planning and cross-region redundancy for latency-sensitive applications.
items.summary_zh: 地缘政治冲突导致巴林与迪拜的亚马逊可用区离线，区域云服务受到干扰。这一中断凸显了区域云基础设施的脆弱性，以及对跨区域灾难恢复和低延迟应用冗余设计的需求。

items.title_en: Jack Dorsey says Block employees now bring prototypes, not slides, to meetings
items.title_zh: Jack Dorsey 表示 Block 员工现在带原型去开会，而不是幻灯片
items.summary_en: Shift from slide decks to working prototypes signals a demand for tangible proof of concept and faster feedback cycles. The practice aligns with product-centric reviews and reduces misalignment caused by abstract plans.
items.summary_zh: 以工作原型取代幻灯片的做法，强调以概念的实际证据换取快速反馈，与产品为中心的评审节奏相吻合，降低抽象计划带来的错位。

items.title_en: The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites
items.title_zh: Indie Internet 指数 – 提交你最喜欢的网站
items.summary_en: A community-driven index encouraging submissions of indie, creator-owned sites, highlighting the resilient, edge of the web beyond big platforms. It serves as a curated discovery space for small, independent projects.
items.summary_zh: 一个由社区驱动的指数，鼓励提交独立、自创的网站，突出大平台之外网络边缘的活力。为小型独立项目提供一个精心策划的发现空间。

items.title_en: Fake Fans
items.title_zh: 假粉丝
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece examining the phenomenon of fake fans online and what it means for creators, audiences, and culture at large.
items.summary_zh: 一篇深度反思，探讨网络虚假粉丝现象对创作者、受众与整体网络文化的影响及其带来的隐忧。

items.title_en: Why are we still using Markdown?
items.title_zh: 我们为什么还在使用 Markdown？
items.summary_en: A critical look at Markdown's limitations and the reasons it persists, exploring alternatives and potential improvements to lightweight markup.
items.summary_zh: 本文批判性地审视 Markdown 的局限性及为何仍在被广泛使用，探讨替代方案和对轻量标记语言的改进空间。

items.title_en: Go on Embedded Systems and WebAssembly
items.title_zh: Go 在嵌入式系统与 WebAssembly 上
items.summary_en: TinyGo enables the Go language to run on microcontrollers and compile to WebAssembly, bringing Go's simplicity to embedded contexts and browser-based apps. This reduces the gap between productive systems programming and constrained hardware, enabling safer, faster development for IoT and frontend apps. It illustrates ongoing efforts to extend high-level languages into resource-constrained domains.
items.summary_zh: TinyGo 让 Go 可以在微控制器和 WebAssembly 上运行，将高层语言的易用性带入受限硬件与浏览器端应用。它缩小了开发生产力与嵌入式资源约束之间的差距，促进物联网与前端应用的安全高效开发。此举体现了将高级语言扩展到资源有限领域的持续努力。

items.title_en: Firm boosts H.264 streaming license fees from $100k up to staggering $4.5M
items.title_zh: 一家公司将 H.264 流媒体许可费从 10 万美元跃升至 450 万美元
items.summary_en: A licensing shift has boosted H.264 streaming royalties from six figures to as high as $4.5 million. The jump highlights patent-driven costs for video delivery and the pressure on streaming services to optimize encoding choices. It signals an ongoing tension between innovation, licensing, and consumer pricing.
items.summary_zh: H.264 流媒体许可费从约 10 万美元跃升至最高 450 万美元，显示出专利驱动的成本压力。此举将影响流媒体服务的编码决策与成本结构，同时凸显创新、授权与消费者价格之间的博弈。

items.title_en: Build your own Dial-up ISP with a Raspberry Pi
items.title_zh: 用树莓派搭建自己的拨号上网服务提供商
items.summary_en: A how-to guide walks readers through building a DIY dial-up ISP using a Raspberry Pi, reviving retro networking for a modern hobbyist project. The steps illustrate practical networking know-how and the ongoing appeal of offline, local control of connectivity. It highlights the educational value of hands-on infrastructure projects.
items.summary_zh: 教程教你用树莓派搭建自己的拨号上网服务提供商，重温现代爱好者的复古网络乐趣。步骤展示了实际的网络连接知识与对离线、在地网络控制的持续吸引力。强调了动手搭建基础设施的教育价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Travel Hacking Toolkit – Points search and trip planning with AI
items.title_zh: Show HN：旅行黑客工具包——使用 AI 的里程点数搜索与行程规划
items.summary_en: A GitHub project that leverages AI to search loyalty-program points across carriers and assemble cost-efficient itineraries. It demonstrates practical automation for optimizing rewards redemptions and could change how enthusiasts plan luxury trips on a budget.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个使用 AI 搜索航司与酒店里程点数并生成性价比高的行程的工具包。它展示了在里程优化和行程规划方面的实际自动化，可能改变喜欢自助旅行者的规划方式。

items.title_en: SSH certificates: the better SSH experience
items.title_zh: SSH 证书：更好的 SSH 体验
items.summary_en: Argues that SSH certificates improve management, revocation, and credential rotation for SSH access by centralizing trust via a CA, reducing user friction and improving security in multi-user environments.
items.summary_zh: 主张通过集中信任的 CA 来实现 SSH 证书，从而提升管理、撤销与凭据轮换的能力，在多用户环境中降低使用难度并提升安全性。

items.title_en: The house is a work of art: Frank Lloyd Wright
items.title_zh: 房子是一件艺术品：弗兰克·劳埃德·赖特
items.summary_en: An essay arguing that Frank Lloyd Wright turned houses into holistic works of art that reflect American conditions, blending form, function, and environment. It explores Wright's design philosophy and cultural impact.
items.summary_zh: 文章论述赖特如何把房子变成整体艺术品，折射美国社会状况并将形式、功能与环境融为一体。它探讨了赖特的设计理念及其文化影响。

items.title_en: The White House App Is Riddled with Cybersecurity Vulnerabilities
items.title_zh: 白宫应用程序充斥着网络安全漏洞
items.summary_en: A security assessment highlights multiple vulnerabilities in a White House app, underscoring ongoing challenges of securing critical government software and the need for robust DevSecOps practices.
items.summary_zh: 对一款白宫应用的安全评估揭示多处漏洞，凸显保护关键政府软件的持续挑战以及对健全 DevSecOps 实践的需求。

items.title_en: Plague Ships
items.title_zh: Plague Ships
items.summary_en: A feature exploring ships that carried plague and how trade routes facilitated pandemics, with reflections on modern health surveillance and port safety. It ties historical shipping to contemporary public health lessons.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦携带瘟疫的船只及贸易路线如何推动疫情扩散，并反思现代卫生监控与港口安全。将历史航运与当代公共卫生教训联系起来。

items.title_en: How to make a sliding, self-locking, and predator-proof chicken coop door (2020)
items.title_zh: 如何制作滑动自锁、猎捕者防护的鸡舍门（2020）
items.summary_en: This 2020 DIY guide explains how to build a sliding, self-locking, predator-proof chicken coop door, focusing on materials, hardware, and reliability. It provides practical instructions for backyard poultry security and long-term maintenance. The design prioritizes safety without sacrificing ease of use.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供了一份 2020 年的自制指南，讲解如何制作一个滑动式、自锁且具备猎捕者防护能力的鸡舍门，着重于材料选择、五金件与可靠性。为自家后院养鸡在安全性与日常维护之间提供了实用的实现思路。

items.title_en: Age verification on Systemd and Flatpak
items.title_zh: Systemd 与 Flatpak 的年龄验证机制
items.summary_en: A post about implementing age verification in Systemd and Flatpak, highlighting privacy tradeoffs and potential impacts on app distribution and user experience.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在 Systemd 与 Flatpak 中实现年龄验证的方案，强调隐私权取舍及对应用分发和用户体验的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: TinyOS – A minimalist RTOS for Cortex-M written in C
items.title_zh: Show HN：TinyOS — 为 Cortex-M 编写的极简 RTOS
items.summary_en: TinyOS is a minimalist real-time operating system for Cortex-M MCUs written in C, aimed at keeping footprint tiny while preserving essential RTOS features. It serves as a compact platform for education, experimentation, and small embedded projects where predictability matters. The project embodies the ethos of lean, hardware-conscious OS design.
items.summary_zh: TinyOS 提供了一个用于 Cortex-M 微控制器、用 C 编写的极简实时操作系统，强调在保持小内存占用的同时保留关键的 RTOS 特性。它适合作为教育、实验和对确定性有高要求的嵌入式小项目的平台。此项目体现了对瘦型、硬件友好操作系统设计的追求。

items.title_en: We replaced RAG with a virtual filesystem for our AI documentation assistant
items.title_zh: 我们用虚拟文件系统替代 RAG 构建 AI 文档助手
items.summary_en: A team swaps Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for a virtual filesystem to organize their AI documentation assistant. The approach reduces latency, simplifies data governance, and makes responses more predictable. It offers a practical blueprint for building reliable AI tooling with fewer external dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 团队用虚拟文件系统取代 RAG 来组织 AI 文档助手的数据，提升性能与可控性。该方法降低延迟、简化数据治理，并使回答更加可预测。为构建稳定、低依赖的 AI 工具提供了务实的架构思路。

items.title_en: Post Mortem: axios NPM supply chain compromise
items.title_zh: Axios 的 NPM 供应链安全事件事后分析
items.summary_en: Axios experienced a supply-chain compromise on npm, with a malicious package version slipping into the ecosystem and executing unsafe code on install. The post-mortem outlines how the breach happened, the remediation steps taken, and key lessons for preventing future incidents.
items.summary_zh: Axios 遭遇 npm 供应链入侵，某个恶意版本在发布后被广泛使用并执行恶意代码。分析稿梳理了漏洞的成因、应对措施以及未来防护要点。

items.title_en: SQLite in Production: Lessons from Running a Store on a Single File
items.title_zh: 生产环境中的 SQLite：单文件运营的经验教训
items.summary_en: Shares real-world lessons from using SQLite as a production datastore in a small storefront, including reliability, backups, migration constraints, and performance considerations. The account shows when a single-file database can be appropriate and what to watch out for.
items.summary_zh: 分享在小型商店生产环境中将 SQLite 作为数据存储的真实经验，包括可靠性、备份、迁移约束与性能考量，指出单一文件数据库何时合适以及需警惕的风险。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How do you handle clients who don't pay on time?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你们如何应对按时不付钱的客户？
items.summary_en: Freelancers share tactics to deter late payments, including clear contracts, upfront deposits, milestone billing, late fees, and automated reminders. The discussion emphasizes both policy and communication to protect cash flow.
items.summary_zh: 自由职业者分享一系列防范拖欠的做法，如清晰合约、预付定金、里程碑计费、逾期罚金以及自动提醒，强调通过制度和沟通来保障现金流。

items.title_en: Big-Endian Testing with QEMU
items.title_zh: 用 QEMU 进行大端测试
items.summary_en: A practical guide to testing big-endian targets with QEMU, including setup tips, pitfalls, and how to validate memory layout and I/O. The takeaway is that QEMU can emulate big-endian targets on little-endian hosts to catch endian-related bugs early.
items.summary_zh: 介绍如何用 QEMU 进行大端测试，包括环境设置、内存布局与 I/O 验证的要点。对于跨架构开发，仿真是提前发现大小端相关问题的有效途径。

items.title_en: Async Python Is Secretly Deterministic
items.title_zh: 异步 Python 实际上是确定性的
items.summary_en: The piece argues that, despite apparent nondeterminism, asyncio within a single event loop is deterministic, yielding reproducible results given the same inputs. It clarifies how async scheduling works and where true nondeterminism can still sneak in (e.g., with multi-threading or external I/O). The takeaway is a clearer mental model for writing reliable async code.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，单个事件循环中的 asyncio 虽然看起来并发不可预测，但执行顺序是确定的，给定相同输入时结果是可重复的。文中解释了异步调度的工作原理，以及在哪些场景（如多线程或外部 I/O）仍可能出现真正的非确定性。核心是帮助开发者建立更清晰的异步编程认知。

items.title_en: The Technocracy Movement of the 1930s
items.title_zh: 1930 年代的技术统治运动
items.summary_en: A look back at the Technocracy Movement of the 1930s, which advocated governing through technocratic expertise and scientific management. The piece connects those ideas to contemporary debates about technocracy in tech policy. It offers historical context and warnings about technocracy's lasting influence.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1930 年代的技术统治运动，该运动主张以技术专长与科学管理来治理社会。文章将这些思想与当下关于科技治理的讨论联系起来，提供历史背景并警示技术精英主义的长期影响。

items.title_en: How to Write Unmaintainable Code (1999)
items.title_zh: 如何写出不可维护的代码（1999）
items.summary_en: A provocative piece from 1999 that catalogs anti-patterns and techniques for intentionally creating hard-to-maintain code, serving as a cautionary historical reference.
items.summary_zh: 这篇1999年的文章列举了多种反模式，演示如何故意编写难以维护的代码，作为历史与警示的参考。

items.title_en: Category Theory Illustrated – Types
items.title_zh: 范畴理论图解系列：类型
items.summary_en: Part of a Category Theory Illustrated series focusing on types explains how type theory and category-theoretic notions align, offering intuitive diagrams to reason about data types, functions, and composition.
items.summary_zh: 范畴理论图解系列之类型篇，解释类型理论与范畴理论的关系，并通过直观图示讲解数据类型、函数与组合的关系。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pluck – Copy any UI from any website, paste it into AI coding tools
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pluck—从任意网站复制 UI，粘贴到 AI 编码工具
items.summary_en: Pluck lets you copy UI from any site and paste it into AI coding tools, enabling rapid prototyping and UI pattern reuse. It also raises questions about copyright and how faithfully UI can be cloned in tooling.
items.summary_zh: Pluck 允许你从任意网站复制界面并粘贴到 AI 编码工具中，便于快速原型设计和界面模式的复用。也引发了关于版权及在工具中复制界面实现程度的讨论。

items.title_en: Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model
items.title_zh: 情感概念及其在大型语言模型中的作用
items.summary_en: Anthropic researchers examine how emotion concepts are represented in a large language model and what function they serve. They consider whether the model truly models emotions or just simulates them, and discuss implications for alignment, safety, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的研究者探讨大型语言模型中情感概念的表示及其作用，评估模型是否真正具备情感或只是表面模拟。研究还讨论这些概念对对齐、安全性和用户体验的影响，以及对界面设计的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: ctx – an Agentic Development Environment (ADE)
items.title_zh: ctx：一个代理驱动的开发环境（ADE）
items.summary_en: ctx provides an environment where tools and datasets are orchestrated for agentic workflows, enabling iterative experimentation with autonomous AI agents. It aims to standardize experimentation and reproducibility in AI-assisted development.
items.summary_zh: ctx 提供一个代理驱动的开发环境，用于协调工具与数据，推动代理驱动的工作流迭代与实验。目标是让 AI 辅助开发过程更易重复、可复现。

items.title_en: Delve sets the record straight on anonymous attacks
items.title_zh: Delve 澄清关于匿名攻击的误解
items.summary_en: Delve clarifies misconceptions about anonymous attacks on their platform and explains how they detect abuse while balancing user privacy. The piece underscores practical security trade-offs and why anonymity is hard to guarantee in modern online services.
items.summary_zh: Delve 针对匿名攻击澄清了误解，解释了他们如何在保护用户隐私的同时检测和缓解滥用行为。文章强调了现实中的安全取舍，以及在现代在线服务中实现真正匿名的困难。

items.title_en: AI Whiz Kids Dropped Out of College and Got Investors to Pay Their Bills
items.title_zh: AI 天才辍学后靠投资者来支付日常开销
items.summary_en: Profiles young AI prodigies who dropped out to pursue startups, leveraging investors to cover living expenses while they build their ventures. The piece sheds light on the talent-sourcing dynamics and funding ecosystems fueling AI entrepreneurship.
items.summary_zh: 讲述一些离开大学的年轻 AI 天才，通过投资者为日常开销买单来推动初创企业发展，揭示人才与资金生态如何共同推动 AI 创业。

items.title_en: Scientists are working on "everything vaccines"
items.title_zh: 科学家正在研发‘全病原疫苗’
items.summary_en: The Economist article surveys efforts to develop broad-coverage vaccines that protect against multiple pathogens, using conserved targets and flexible platforms like mRNA. It outlines the scientific hurdles—breadth, durability, safety—and why these vaccines could transform pandemic preparedness.
items.summary_zh: 本文综述了开发覆盖多病原体的“全病原疫苗”的努力，着眼于利用保守靶点和灵活平台（如 mRNA）来实现广谱免疫。文中指出在覆盖面、持久性和安全性方面的挑战，以及此类疫苗为何可能改变全球的疫情应对能力。

items.title_en: Naming rights to street auctioned in San Francisco
items.title_zh: 旧金山街道命名权拍卖
items.summary_en: San Francisco starts auctioning naming rights for streets to raise revenue, inviting brands to sponsor street names for a period. The move illustrates how cities experiment with unconventional financing and raises questions about navigation, neighborhood culture, and equity.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山通过拍卖街道命名权来筹集资金，允许品牌在一段时间内冠名街道。此举展示了城市在资金筹措上的新尝试，也引发了对导航、城市文化与公平性的讨论。

items.title_en: Emotion Concepts and Their Function in a Large Language Model
items.title_zh: 情感概念及其在大型语言模型中的作用
items.summary_en: Looks at how LLMs represent and manipulate emotion concepts, and what that implies for user experience, alignment, and the boundary between simulated affect and real agency. The discussion clarifies why emotion modeling matters in practice.
items.summary_zh: 探讨大型语言模型如何表示与处理情感概念，以及这对用户体验、对齐与真假情感的界限意味着什么。讨论阐明情感建模在实际中的意义。

items.title_en: What changes when you turn a Linux box into a router
items.title_zh: 将 Linux 盒子变成路由器时会有哪些变化
items.summary_en: Turning a Linux box into a router involves enabling IP forwarding, configuring NAT, DHCP/DNS, and firewall rules, turning a spare machine into a functional network gateway. It offers flexibility and learning opportunities but comes with maintenance and performance trade-offs compared to dedicated devices. The upgrade highlights the versatility of Linux networking tooling for home labs and small deployments.
items.summary_zh: 把 Linux 盒子变成路由器需要开启 IP 转发、配置 NAT、DHCP/DNS 和防火墙等，能把闲置机器变成可用的网络网关。这种做法提高了灵活性与学习机会，但在维护与性能方面也要权衡，尤其相较于专用路由器。此改造展示了 Linux 网络工具在家庭实验室与小型部署中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Improving my focus by giving up my big monitor
items.title_zh: 通过放弃大屏来提升专注力
items.summary_en: A personal experiment shows giving up a big monitor can improve focus by reducing distractions and encouraging deeper work. The author outlines practical steps and reflections for redesigning a workstation.
items.summary_zh: 作者通过放弃大屏幕的尝试发现专注力提升，减少分心并促使更深度工作。文中给出具体做法与对工作环境改造的反思。

items.title_en: Herbie: Automatically improve imprecise floating point formulas
items.title_zh: Herbie：自动改进不精确的浮点公式
items.summary_en: Herbie automatically refactors floating-point expressions to reduce numerical error, helping engineers achieve more precise results. It applies symbolic transformations to improve stability without manual rewrites.
items.summary_zh: Herbie 自动重构浮点表达式以降低数值误差，帮助工程师获得更精确的结果。它通过符号变换实现稳定性提升，避免了人工重写的工作量。

items.title_en: The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House
items.title_zh: 教堂、集市与温彻斯特神秘屋
items.summary_en: Juxtaposes the cathedral-and-bazaar software-development metaphor with the kaleidoscopic, maze-like Winchester Mystery House to illustrate how architecture and process shape software outcomes. Argues for pragmatic blends of governance and experimentation to avoid overengineering and creeping complexity.
items.summary_zh: 将 cathedral 与 bazaar 的软件开发隐喻，与温彻斯特神秘屋的错综复杂进行对照，说明结构和流程如何左右软件成品。主张在治理与试验之间取得务实平衡，避免过度设计与复杂化。

items.title_en: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 在 25 个物种上用 165 美元训练 mRNA 语言模型
items.summary_en: A low-cost approach to training language-model-style representations on mRNA sequences across 25 species for about 165 USD. It showcases how accessible computational biology can be and could enable broader comparative analyses.
items.summary_zh: 以约 165 美元的成本，在 25 个物种的 mRNA 序列上训练类似语言模型的表示，展示了计算生物学的广泛可及性，并可能推动跨物种比较分析。

items.title_en: What we learned building 100 API integrations with OpenCode
items.title_zh: 我们在 OpenCode 上构建 100 个 API 集成学到的经验
items.summary_en: A study of building 100 API integrations with OpenCode reveals patterns, common pitfalls, and best practices for developer experience, error handling, and consistency across APIs. The takeaway is a practical playbook for API integration at scale.
items.summary_zh: 分享在 OpenCode 平台上构建 100 个 API 集成的经验，涵盖开发者体验、错误处理与跨接口的一致性等要点，提供规模化 API 集成的实用方法论。

items.title_en: Linux Running in a PDF (2025)
items.title_zh: 在 PDF 中运行 Linux（2025）
items.summary_en: Linux running in a PDF is a playful 2025 demonstration of embedding executable Linux-like environments inside PDFs, challenging assumptions about document capabilities and security.
items.summary_zh: 在 PDF 中运行 Linux 的演示展示了在文档中嵌入可执行的类 Linux 环境，挑战了对文档能力和安全性的直觉。

items.title_en: The most-disliked people in the publishing industry
items.title_zh: 出版行业中最不受欢迎的人
items.summary_en: Explores who in publishing earns the most dislike and why, using industry anecdotes to reveal gatekeeping, power dynamics, and how reputations shape opportunities for authors and editors. The piece offers a candid look at culture and what it implies for newcomers.
items.summary_zh: 本文揭示出版行业中最不被喜欢的群体，以及背后的门槛、权力关系与口碑如何影响作者与编辑的机会。通过行业趣闻，呈现行业文化的真实面貌及对新人的含义。

items.title_en: The smallest ELF executable (2021)
items.title_zh: 最小的 ELF 可执行文件（2021）
items.summary_en: A deep dive into techniques for shrinking an ELF binary, from minimalist runtime choices to linker tricks and stripping. It showcases how far modern toolchains can be pushed to produce tiny yet functional executables.
items.summary_zh: 探讨压缩 ELF 二进制文件的技巧，包括最小化运行时、链接器技巧和剥离多余代码，展示现代工具链在产出极小可执行文件上的潜力。

items.title_en: Bourbon waste could provide next-gen supercapacitor components
items.title_zh: 波本酒渣或成下一代超级电容器材料
items.summary_en: Researchers are turning distillery waste into materials for next-generation supercapacitors, potentially lowering costs and boosting sustainability for energy storage. The work highlights a trend of turning waste streams into high-value components and could advance practical, rapid-charging storage tech.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将波本酒厂的废物转化为新一代超级电容器的材料，或降低成本并提升能源存储的可持续性。此举体现了把废弃物转化为高价值材料的趋势，或推动快速充电、可持续的储能技术。

items.title_en: DCJ11Hack+ – DEC PDP/11 based homebrew computer
items.title_zh: DCJ11Hack+：基于 DEC PDP/11 的自制计算机
items.summary_en: A homebrew computer built around the PDP-11 architecture demonstrates retrocomputing enthusiasm with modern builds or recreations. The entry highlights hardware choices, software, and the maker community around PDP-11-inspired machines.
items.summary_zh: DCJ11Hack+ 是一台基于 DEC PDP-11 架构的自制计算机，体现了对复古计算机的热爱与再现。文章介绍了硬件选型、软件实现以及 PDP-11 风格机器的自制者社区。

items.title_en: Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future
items.title_zh: 电气变压器制造正在拖慢 Electrified 未来
items.summary_en: Explains bottlenecks in transformer manufacturing that threaten to slow down electrification efforts, including EV infrastructure. Highlights supply chain fragility and policy implications.
items.summary_zh: 阐述变压器制造的瓶颈可能拖慢电气化进程（包括电动车基础设施），凸显供应链脆弱性及政策影响。

items.title_en: 50 years measuring the cleanest air
items.title_zh: 50 年测量全球最洁净的空气
items.summary_en: A long-running program from CSIRO marks 50 years of measuring the world's cleanest air, detailing how instrumentation and data practices have evolved.
items.summary_zh: CSIRO 等机构的长期观测项目庆祝 50 周年，持续测量全球最清洁的空气，并追踪仪器和数据处理的演进。该研究强调了清洁空气数据对健康、气候研究和政策制定的重要作用。

items.title_en: Remembering Magnetic Memories and the Apollo AGC
items.title_zh: 追忆磁性记忆与阿波罗 AGC
items.summary_en: Remembers the magnetic memory tech that powered the Apollo Guidance Computer, illustrating how early hardware engineering achieved remarkable reliability under tight constraints.
items.summary_zh: 回顾阿波罗导航计算机所依赖的磁性记忆技术，展示在极端条件下早期硬件的可靠性。文章提炼出对系统设计、韧性和硬件老化极限的启示。

items.title_en: Sequential Optimal Packing for PCB Placement
items.title_zh: 用于 PCB 布局的序列最优打包
items.summary_en: Introduces an algorithmic approach to sequentially packing PCB components for better density and shorter interconnects, with implications for manufacturing efficiency and thermal performance. The post blends theory with practical routing considerations.
items.summary_zh: 提出一种用于 PCB 布局的序列最优打包算法，提升元件密度、缩短互连长度，并优化制造效率与散热表现。文章在理论与实际布线之间给出折中与应用指引。

items.title_en: South Polar Times
items.title_zh: 南极时报
items.summary_en: South Polar Times
items.summary_zh: 南极时报的圆桌讨论回顾了极地探险文化与科学在南极的历史影响，揭示早期探索叙事如何形塑现代极地研究与环境认识。通过对历史的回顾，读者能理解极地研究的文化背景与科学进展的交汇。

items.title_en: Why Inventing Color TV Was So Difficult [video]
items.title_zh: 发明彩色电视为何如此困难（视频）
items.summary_en: A historical tour of the technical and standards challenges that made color TV viable, from color encoding and signal compatibility to broadcast standards battles. The story helps modern hardware teams appreciate the long arc from concept to consumer-ready product.
items.summary_zh: 从颜色编码、信号兼容到广播标准之争，讲述彩色电视得以商用的技术与标准挑战。这个历史梳理帮助现代硬件团队理解从概念到面向消费者的产品落地的漫长过程。

items.title_en: Windows++: C++ Application Framework for Windows by Paul DiLascia
items.title_zh: Windows++：Paul DiLascia 的 Windows C++ 应用框架
items.summary_en: Windows++ is an early C++ application framework for Windows created by Paul DiLascia, offering a set of utilities and patterns for building GUI apps on Windows. The note discusses its influence on Windows programming, design ideas, and where it sits relative to modern frameworks.
items.summary_zh: Windows++ 是 Paul DiLascia 为 Windows 开发的一款早期 C++ 应用框架，提供一组用于构建 GUI 应用的工具与设计模式。相关内容回顾了它对 Windows 编程的影响，以及在当今现代框架中的定位。

items.title_en: An experimental guide to Answer Engine Optimization
items.title_zh: 回答引擎优化实验指南
items.summary_en: Proposes a hands-on, experimental approach to optimizing for answer engines—covering prompt design, data sourcing, evaluation metrics, and iteration. Includes practical guides and suggested experiments to improve accuracy and usefulness of answer-based systems.
items.summary_zh: 提供了一种面向回答引擎的实验性优化方法，包括提示设计、数据来源、评估指标和迭代流程，并给出可操作的实验建议，提升基于回答的系统的准确性与实用性。

items.title_en: Notes from from Butterick's Practical Typography
items.title_zh: Butterick 实用排版学笔记
items.summary_en: Notes from Butterick's Practical Typography distill practical, readable typography tips for web and print, focusing on margins, line length, and white space. It offers actionable guidelines for sharper, more legible design.
items.summary_zh: 整理自 Butterick 的《Practical Typography》的要点，聚焦网页与印刷排版的实用建议，如页边距、行长与留白等，提供提升可读性的具体指南。
